subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Though time hath elapsed and this servant hath found no opportunity to pen or dispatch a reply [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق هر چند مدتی گذشت و این عبد فرصت تحریری نیافت و تقریری جوابا ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
